title: Head in the Clouds
description: Adds a lofty new dimension for you to explore, The Stratos. Currently in alpha!
body:
Currently in alpha. If you encounter any bugs, have any questions or suggestions, please let me know!



Head in the Clouds adds one dimension to the game. It's a sky dimension, loosely based on the scrapped Overworld-like version of the End from way back when. To access it, try laying in a bed at night a few times. If that doesn't work, try again the next night. You'll get there eventually!

All music and some textures made by [Kuiper](https://youtube.com/@Kuiper.)!

[Curseforge Page](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hitc)
